headline: 暑期档新片蓄势待发，趋势榜暗流涌动
headlineEn: Summer Blockbusters Looming, Trending List Sees Shifts
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：无新片上映，但《奥德赛》《后室》持续霸榜。《痴迷》《鬼谜东宫》等作品热度上升。行业聚焦《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》等未来大片期待。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but 'Odyssey' and 'Backrooms' dominate trends. Titles like 'Obsession' and 'Ghost Mystery East Palace' gain heat. Industry eyes upcoming 'Spider-Man: Fresh Start' and 'Avatar: The Last Airbender'.

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》定档引期待
industryHighlights.en: 'Spider-Man: Fresh Start' release date sparks anticipation

industryHighlights.text: 《安昂传奇：最后的气宗》真人版筹备中
industryHighlights.en: 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' live-action in development

industryHighlights.text: 本周趋势榜《幸运女神》等新片挤入前十
industryHighlights.en: Weekly trending sees 'Goddess of Luck' among new entries in top 10

industryHighlights.text: 暑期档后半程竞争激烈，多部大片蓄势
industryHighlights.en: Second half of summer season heats up with multiple blockbusters on deck
